sentence: 买回来的鱼如果吃不完就放进冷冻室。
pinyin: Mǎi huílái de yú rúguǒ chī bù wán jiù fàng jìn lěngdòng shì.
english: If you can't finish the fish you bought, put it in the freezer.

sentence: 爸爸还保留着几盘旧磁带。
pinyin: Bàba hái bǎoliúzhe jǐ pán jiù cídài.
english: Dad still has a few old cassette tapes.

sentence: 他很担心这次裁员会砸了自己的饭碗。
pinyin: Tā hěn dānxīn zhè cì cáiyuán huì zá le zìjǐ de fànwǎn.
english: He is very worried that this round of layoffs will cost him his job.

sentence: 这个老手艺渐渐没落，会的人越来越少了。
pinyin: Zhè ge lǎo shǒu yì jiàn jiàn mò luò, huì de rén yuè lái yuè shǎo le.
english: This old craft is gradually declining, and fewer and fewer people know it.

sentence: 她从小就梦想成为一名宇航员。
pinyin: Tā cóngxiǎo jiù mèngxiǎng chéngwéi yī míng yǔhángyuán.
english: She has dreamed of becoming an astronaut since childhood.
